channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Termometro Politico, 1–2 July 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Noi Moderati (EPP): 0 seats
  • Italia Viva (RE): 0 seats
  • Più Europa (RE): 0 seats
  • Democrazia Sovrana e Popolare (NI): 0 seats
  • Fratelli d’Italia (ECR): 23–26 seats
  • Partito Progressista (*): 0 seats
  • Partito Democratico (S&D): 17–20 seats
  • Movimento 5 Stelle (GUE/NGL): 9–11 seats
  • Futuro Nazionale (ESN): 4–6 seats
  • Forza Italia (EPP): 5–7 seats
  • Azione (RE): 0 seats
  • Sinistra Italiana (GUE/NGL): 2–3 seats
  • Lega Nord (PfE): 5–7 seats
  • Europa Verde (Greens/EFA): 3–4 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by Termometro Politico, 1–2 July 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Termometro Politico, 1–2 July 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Noi Moderati (EPP): 0.7–1.7%
  • Italia Viva (RE): 1.8–3.2%
  • Più Europa (RE): 1.2–2.4%
  • Democrazia Sovrana e Popolare (NI): 0.6–1.5%
  • Fratelli d’Italia (ECR): 26.0–29.9%
  • Partito Progressista (*): 0.3–1.1%
  • Partito Democratico (S&D): 19.8–23.4%
  • Movimento 5 Stelle (GUE/NGL): 10.9–13.8%
  • Futuro Nazionale (ESN): 4.3–6.3%
  • Forza Italia (EPP): 6.7–9.1%
  • Azione (RE): 2.2–3.6%
  • Sinistra Italiana (GUE/NGL): 1.8–3.2%
  • Lega Nord (PfE): 5.4–7.6%
  • Europa Verde (Greens/EFA): 2.9–4.6%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Quorum – YouTrend for Sky TG24, 30 June–1 July 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
Opinion Poll by Quorum – YouTrend for Sky TG24, 30 June–1 July 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Partito Liberaldemocratico (RE): 0.6–2.1%
  • Ora! (*): 0.5–1.9%
  • Noi Moderati (EPP): 0.3–1.6%
  • Italia Viva (RE): 1.6–3.8%
  • Più Europa (RE): 0.8–2.4%
  • Fratelli d’Italia (ECR): 24.0–30.1%
  • Partito Progressista (*): 0.3–1.4%
  • Partito Democratico (S&D): 19.3–25.0%
  • Movimento 5 Stelle (GUE/NGL): 9.9–14.4%
  • Futuro Nazionale (ESN): 4.9–8.3%
  • Forza Italia (EPP): 6.0–9.7%
  • Azione (RE): 2.4–5.0%
  • Sinistra Italiana (GUE/NGL): 1.5–3.6%
  • Lega Nord (PfE): 4.1–7.2%
  • Europa Verde (Greens/EFA): 2.5–5.1%

  • Sinistra Italiana (GUE/NGL): 1.6–3.4%
